globalGate.summary: All 10 HV slices PASSED. Garrison now shows everything the Operative is made of in ONE Compose view — the 8 role faculties grouped essential-vs-optional PLUS the Claude Code components (Skills/Hooks/Agent-Tools/Plugins) sourced from the live ~/.claude StateModel — with edit-in-place and enable/disable = a real PARKED move. Fixed the MCP source-of-truth bug (live /api/quarters now shows 7 real servers, was 0 reading the empty mcp.json). Disabled mcp/hooks park off-disk under ~/.garrison/parked and read back via active∪parked so the disable->enable loop round-trips. ~/.claude.json writes use a compare-and-swap + bounded-retry guard that aborts leaving the live file untouched (never restore-old-backup), refuses to overwrite a corrupt file, and preserves every sibling byte-for-value. Gates: typecheck 0, lint clean, build 0 (isolated dist), composition-view e2e 6/6 across 3 viewports + 24-test MCP e2e regression green, full unit suite green except 3 PRE-EXISTING/load-flake files unrelated to the wave (gemini-runtime deterministic; documents-cli + artifact-store-cli pass isolated). Cross-model: HV-A approve, HV-backend approve (2 rounds, 5 high findings fixed), HV8 codex 3A approve (4 rounds) + codex 3B independent playwright PASS.
